title: Solving First-Order Linear ODE
description: Method for solving first-order linear ordinary differential equations
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start: Identify First-Order Linear ODE] --> B1["Form: dy/dx + P(x)y = Q(x)"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1{{"Is the equation in the form dy/dx + P(x)y = Q(x)?"}} style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1["Identify P(x) and Q(x)"] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 -- No --> E1["Rearrange the equation to the standard form"] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> B1 D1 --> F1["Calculate the Integrating Factor: μ(x) = exp(∫P(x) dx)"] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 --> G1["μ(x) = exp(∫P(x) dx)"] style G1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff G1 --> H1["Multiply both sides of the equation by μ(x): μ(x) * (dy/dx + P(x)y) = μ(x) * Q(x)"] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1["d/dx [μ(x)y] = μ(x) Q(x)"] style I1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff I1 --> J1["Integrate both sides with respect to x: ∫d/dx [μ(x)y] dx = ∫μ(x) Q(x) dx"] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1["μ(x)y = ∫μ(x) Q(x) dx + C"] style K1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff K1 --> L1["Solve for y: y = (1/μ(x)) * (∫μ(x) Q(x) dx + C)"] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> M1["y = (1/μ(x)) * (∫μ(x) Q(x) dx + C)"] style M1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff M1 --> N1{{"Are initial conditions provided?"}} style N1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 N1 -- Yes --> O1["Substitute initial conditions into the solution and solve for C"] style O1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff O1 --> P1["Find the value of C"] style P1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff P1 --> Q1["Substitute the value of C into the general solution"] style Q1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff Q1 --> R1["Particular solution with C value"] style R1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff R1 --> S1[End: Particular solution] style S1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff N1 -- No --> T1[End: General Solution] style T1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff M1 --> T1 R1 --> S1
